'''''Victory 2''''' was an [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] [[Victory II-class Star Destroyer/Legends|''Victory II''-class Star Destroyer]]. It destroyed the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel]] [[Bulk cruiser/Legends|Bulk cruiser]] [[Fairfax (bulk cruiser)|''Fairfax'']] in the [[Battle of the Bajic Shipyards]].<ref name="X-wing alliance" />

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars: X-Wing Alliance]]'' {{1st}}
